rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EDDIE GALLOWAY & MARY CATHERINE GALLOWAY LIVING TRUST OF SEPTEMBER 1993
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Amend Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
rulings.Rulings: The motion to amend is granted. Respondents did not file a timely opposition. Even if the Court were to consider the late-filed opposition, no sufficient reason is offered to deny the opportunity to amend. Any party who wishes to argue the motion and tentative ruling must notify opposing counsel and the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, June 20, 2012.
